title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Om Book Shop

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Om Book Shop
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!
